title: Garlicky Dense Australian Wood Ear Mushrooms Roast
description: A date-night Australian dish featuring wood ear mushrooms, perfect for a special occasion. The combination of garlic, herbs, and spices creates a rich and aromatic flavor profile.
instructions: Toss the wood ear mushrooms with olive oil, garlic, thyme, and rosemary in a bowl.
Season the potatoes and carrots with salt and pepper.
In a separate bowl, whisk together lemon juice and olive oil.
Place the potatoes and carrots on a baking sheet and drizzle with the lemon juice mixture.
Roast the vegetables in the oven for 20 minutes.
Add the wood ear mushrooms to the baking sheet and continue roasting for another 10 minutes.
Remove the baking sheet from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes.
Serve the roasted vegetables hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
